description_long: This self-service payment kiosk or terminal features a rectangular, industrial metal housing with a weathered, utilitarian finish. The front face is divided into two main color blocks: a white section with a large, dark display screen and a yellow section containing a vertical slot, likely for card or ticket insertion. A sturdy yellow handle is mounted on the left side, and the right side is marked with diagonal black and yellow hazard stripes. Below the screen, there is a panel with printed instructions and a lockable compartment, as well as a small circular button or sensor. The overall design suggests durability for outdoor or semi-outdoor urban environments, with clear functional zones for user interaction and maintenance access.
description: A rugged, rectangular self-service payment kiosk with a large display, card slot, and industrial handle, finished in white and yellow with hazard stripes.
description_view_0: Front view showing the display screen, card slot, instruction panel, and handle.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the yellow handle and hazard-striped side panel.
description_view_2: Rear or alternate front view with the display, card slot, and instruction panel visible from a different angle.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the handle and the continuation of the hazard stripes.
attribute_display_screen: A large, rectangular display screen is present on the upper front section, oriented vertically with a thin bezel and dark, non-reflective surface. No visible content is displayed.
attribute_payment_interface: A vertical card slot is located on the right side of the front face, integrated into the yellow section, likely for card or ticket insertion.
attribute_branding_or_logo: A small alphanumeric code 'S3-1280' is printed in black on the upper right corner of the yellow section; no corporate logo is visible.
attribute_instructional_signage: A white rectangular instruction panel with printed text is located below the display screen on the front, providing user guidance in a clear, readable format.
attribute_receipt_dispenser: A horizontal slot below the display and instruction panel, likely serving as a receipt dispenser or printer slot, is present and easily accessible.
